source_jobs.title: Product Operations Intern
source_jobs.description:
Synthflow AI is an enterprise AI agent platform that unifies customer operations across voice, chat, and messaging. Our agents handle routine interactions at scale so teams can focus on high-value work.

 - Over 20M hours of operations automated

 - 60% more calls answered vs. non-AI operators

 - 150M interactions handled, 99.99% uptime

Backed by Accel, Atlantic Labs, and Singular. Trusted by 1,000+ customers. Recognized as one of the most promising companies in Germany.



About the role

Synthflow is building the infrastructure layer for enterprise voice AI. As we scale, the systems, processes, and data that power our product team need to scale with us.

We’re looking for a Product Operations Intern to support the product team across tooling, analytics, documentation, and cross-functional coordination. You’ll work closely with Product, Engineering, Customer Success, and Design, gaining hands-on experience in how a fast-growing AI company builds and ships products at scale.

This is an ideal role for someone looking to break into product, operations, or tech from a related background and learn how high-performing product teams operate.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Help maintain and improve the product team’s tooling stack, including Linear, Notion, PostHog, and related workflows

 - Support the creation of dashboards and reports that track product usage, feature adoption, and key business metrics

 - Assist with release management processes, including changelog updates and internal communications

 - Help keep roadmaps, tickets, and project documentation organized and up to date

 - Gather, organize, and synthesize customer feedback from Customer Success, Sales, and user research initiatives

 - Document processes, meeting notes, and best practices to improve team efficiency

 - Support onboarding materials and maintain internal knowledge bases

 - Assist with operational, analytical, and cross-functional projects across the product organization
   


WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 - 0–2 years of experience in operations, customer success, consulting, business analysis, project coordination, startups, or a similar problem-solving environment (recent graduates encouraged to apply)

 - Strong organizational skills with exceptional attention to detail

 - Analytical mindset with the ability to structure information, spot patterns, and turn data into actionable insights

 - AI-literate and excited to leverage modern AI tools to improve workflows, productivity, and decision-making

 - Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to work across technical and non-technical teams

 - Curious, proactive, and eager to learn how products are built and scaled in a fast-moving startup environment

 - Nice to have: familiarity with tools such as Notion, Linear, Jira, PostHog, or Airtable, and basic experience with data analysis, SQL, Python, spreadsheets, or automation tools

Founded in Berlin in 2023 by serial entrepreneurs Albert Astabatsyan, Hakob Astabatsyan, and Sassun Mirzakhan-Saky, Synthflow AI democratizes access to advanced voice AI with a no-code platform that lets enterprises easily create, deploy and scale natural-sounding, cost-effective voice agents tailored to their business needs.

source_jobs.title: CEO Office Intern
source_jobs.description:
Synthflow AI is an enterprise AI agent platform that unifies customer operations across voice, chat, and messaging. Our agents handle routine interactions at scale so teams can focus on high-value work.

 - Over 20M hours of operations automated

 - 60% more calls answered vs. non-AI operators

 - 150M interactions handled, 99.99% uptime

Backed by Accel, Atlantic Labs, and Singular. Trusted by 1,000+ customers. Recognized as one of the most promising companies in Germany.



What You’ll Do

 - Work closely with the founding team to drive key go-to-market initiatives and special projects.

 - Support marketing, partnerships, content, hiring and product launch campaigns from ideation to execution.

 - Take ownership of ad-hoc strategic projects, solving problems end-to-end with speed and precision.

 - Operate as a versatile generalist, helping wherever needed – from copywriting to market research.

 - Proactively identify opportunities to optimize growth and GTM processes, and execute independently.


What We’re Looking For

 - Entrepreneurial mindset with a passion for startups, AI, and growth.

 - Sharp communication skills (written & verbal) and strong attention to detail.

 - Highly organized multitasker who thrives in fast-paced environments.

 - Proactive, hands-on, and solution-oriented – you figure things out and make things happen.

 - Bachelor’s degree in progress or completed (business, marketing, or related field)



Why Join Us?

 - Best launchpad for your career in tech startups – work directly with the founders and see how an AI startup scales.

 - A dynamic, international team that values creativity, initiative, and collaboration.

 - Become part of a high-growth AI company backed by top-tier VCs.

 - Startup vibe: flat hierarchies, quick decisions, ownership from day one, modern office in Berlin

 - Subsidized Urban Sports Club membership and plenty of other perks.


Ready to jump in and build the future of Voice AI? 🚀

Founded in Berlin in 2023 by serial entrepreneurs Albert Astabatsyan, Hakob Astabatsyan, and Sassun Mirzakhan-Saky, Synthflow AI democratizes access to advanced voice AI with a no-code platform that lets enterprises easily create, deploy and scale natural-sounding, cost-effective voice agents tailored to their business needs.

source_jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer - (Go) Real-Time Engine
source_jobs.description:
Synthflow AI is an enterprise AI agent platform that unifies customer operations across voice, chat, and messaging. Our agents handle routine interactions at scale so teams can focus on high-value work.

 - Over 20M hours of operations automated

 - 60% more calls answered vs. non-AI operators

 - 150M interactions handled, 99.99% uptime

Backed by Accel, Atlantic Labs, and Singular. Trusted by 1,000+ customers. Recognized as one of the most promising companies in Germany.




ABOUT SYNTHFLOW

At Synthflow http://synthflow.ai/ we’re building the easiest way for businesses to create AI-powered phone agents. No coding, no fuss—just smarter automation. We’re passionate about delivering the future of voice technology with lightning-fast, scalable solutions. It’s an exciting time at Synthflow: we’re early, fast-growing, and laser-focused on impact. Join us to do the best work of your career while helping businesses thrive.




ABOUT THE ROLE

We’re looking for a Senior Go Software Engineer to build real-time voice AI systems that set the standard.




YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES WILL INCLUDE:

 - Design and enhance backend infrastructure focusing on scalability, performance, and reliability. Implement features and maintain the systems that power our next-generation products.

 - Expertly manage concurrency and parallelism in Go using goroutines, channels, and synchronization primitives like mutexes and wait groups.

 - Develop robust networking and streaming capabilities, including experience with network programming, sockets, and protocols like WebSockets and WebRTC.

 - Lead performance optimization initiatives by profiling Go code, reducing latency, and efficiently managing memory and garbage collection.

 - Build fault-tolerant systems with strong recovery mechanisms and failover strategies to maintain service continuity.

 - Implement comprehensive logging and tracing using tools such as zap, klog, OpenTelemetry, and Jaeger to enhance monitoring and troubleshooting.

 - Apply Test-Driven Development (TDD) and engage in Pair Programming to ensure high code quality and promote team collaboration.

 - Participate actively in code reviews, offering constructive feedback to uphold code quality and adhere to best practices.

 - Stay informed on the latest in software development and contribute to the team's continuous learning and improvement.


YOU HAVE:

 - At least 5 years of professional experience with Go, along with a track record of developing scalable and extensible systems.

 - Additional proficiency in Python and familiarity with infrastructure containerization, DevOps (preferably GCP or AWS).

 - Extensive experience in creating and maintaining robust APIs and implementing advanced CI/CD pipelines.

 - A strong foundation in software engineering principles and a commitment to leading-edge practices including TDD, pair programming, and continuous integration.




BEYOND THE BASICS:

 - Exposure to real-time infrastructure or latency critical systems

 - Nice to have: A background in AI, particularly around Large Language Models, Speech to Text, and Voice Synthesis applications.

 - Knowledge of distributed computing and cloud infrastructure at scale.




WHAT WE OFFER:

 - Autonomy at speed: High-ownership roles in a fast-moving startup.

 - Remote-first flexibility: Contribute from anywhere, on your schedule.

 - Cutting-edge technology: Work on what interests you most.

 - Career growth: Scale your impact as the company grows.

 - Rewarding package: Competitive pay, equity options, and comprehensive benefits that reflect your skills and experience. 




Founded in Berlin in 2023 by serial entrepreneurs Albert Astabatsyan, Hakob Astabatsyan, and Sassun Mirzakhan-Saky, Synthflow AI democratizes access to advanced voice AI with a no-code platform that lets enterprises easily create, deploy and scale natural-sounding, cost-effective voice agents tailored to their business needs.

source_jobs.title: Growth Marketer
source_jobs.description:
Synthflow AI is an enterprise AI agent platform that unifies customer operations across voice, chat, and messaging. Our agents handle routine interactions at scale so teams can focus on high-value work.

 - Over 20M hours of operations automated

 - 60% more calls answered vs. non-AI operators

 - 150M interactions handled, 99.99% uptime

Backed by Accel, Atlantic Labs, and Singular. Trusted by 1,000+ customers. Recognized as one of the most promising companies in Germany.




ABOUT THE ROLE

Own and scale Synthflow’s end-to-end growth engine, driving pipeline generation and marketing-attributed revenue. Execute and optimize high-performing acquisition channels while building new scalable growth loops. Translate product capabilities into compelling messaging and collaborate with GTM teams to accelerate funnel performance and revenue growth.




RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Own and scale Synthflow’s growth engine with full responsibility for pipeline generation and marketing-driven revenue.

 - Drive high-quality pipeline through core channels (LinkedIn, Google, SEO/organic), while continuously testing and scaling new acquisition loops.

 - Translate voice AI product capabilities into clear, high-converting positioning and messaging for mid-market and enterprise buyers.

 - Work closely with GTM teams to improve lead quality, optimize funnel conversion, and accelerate deal cycles.

 - Build and optimize a full-funnel growth system, including attribution, campaign tracking, and conversion infrastructure (HubSpot).

 - Identify and unlock new growth levers such as partnerships, referrals, and outbound-supported campaigns; validate quickly and scale what works.

 - Own marketing budget and performance in partnership with finance, including CAC, LTV, and payback period; define ROI targets and evaluate spend effectiveness.

 - Operate with high autonomy as a hands-on individual contributor, combining strategy, execution, and technical marketing to build repeatable growth engines.




REQUIREMENTS

 - Proven track record of building and scaling B2B growth engines across LinkedIn and Google (minimum ~3 years hands-on).

 - Strong understanding of US B2B market dynamics, including ICP definition, messaging, and buyer behavior for high ACV deals ($250K+).

 - Deep expertise in performance marketing, attribution, and tools such as HubSpot, including form tracking and full-funnel analytics.

 - Ability to design, run, and iterate experiments quickly, with strong judgment on what good performance looks like across channels.

 - Experience working closely with sales teams (SDRs/AEs) in a sales-driven environment, with clear ownership of pipeline impact.

 - Strong analytical and technical mindset, comfortable working with data, tracking infrastructure, and campaign systems.

 - Experience in a high-growth B2B SaaS or AI environment, with a clear bias toward execution and building from scratch.

Founded in Berlin in 2023 by serial entrepreneurs Albert Astabatsyan, Hakob Astabatsyan, and Sassun Mirzakhan-Saky, Synthflow AI democratizes access to advanced voice AI with a no-code platform that lets enterprises easily create, deploy and scale natural-sounding, cost-effective voice agents tailored to their business needs.

source_jobs.title: Lead VOIP Engineer (FreeSWITCH & Kamailio)
source_jobs.description:
Synthflow AI is an enterprise AI agent platform that unifies customer operations across voice, chat, and messaging. Our agents handle routine interactions at scale so teams can focus on high-value work.

 - Over 20M hours of operations automated

 - 60% more calls answered vs. non-AI operators

 - 150M interactions handled, 99.99% uptime

Backed by Accel, Atlantic Labs, and Singular. Trusted by 1,000+ customers. Recognized as one of the most promising companies in Germany.




LEAD VOIP ENGINEER (FREESWITCH & KAMAILIO)

Location: Berlin/Remote
Job Type: Full-Time
Experience Level: Senior



ABOUT THE ROLE

We are seeking an experienced VOIP Engineer with a strong background in FreeSWITCH and Kamailio to join our team. The ideal candidate will have extensive experience in SIP-based communications, RTP streaming, and conferencing solutions, along with a deep understanding of high-load production environments. You will be responsible for designing, implementing, and optimizing scalable VOIP solutions while ensuring high availability and performance.



RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Design, deploy, and maintain FreeSWITCH and Kamailio-based VoIP solutions.

 - Configure and troubleshoot SIP protocols, RTP streams, and media gateways.

 - Monitor and optimize high-load production FreeSWITCH and VOIP systems.

 - Implement and manage SIP monitoring tools like Homer or other real-time debugging solutions.

 - Develop and fine-tune call routing, failover mechanisms, and load balancing strategies.

 - Ensure security, scalability, and redundancy in the VoIP infrastructure.

 - Troubleshoot and resolve VoIP-related issues in production environments.

 - Collaborate with development, DevOps, and support teams to improve system performance.

 - Work with SIP Trunks, SBCs (Session Border Controllers), and Media Servers.

 - Implement WebRTC-based voice and video solutions.

 - Document system configurations, troubleshooting guides, and best practices.
   


REQUIREMENTS

 - 5+ years of experience in VOIP engineering, particularly with FreeSWITCH and Kamailio.

 - 3 years of experience with k8s on production systems is a must have.

 - Strong expertise in SIP protocol, RTP streaming, and VoIP call flows.

 - Experience working in high-load production FreeSWITCH environments.

 - Hands-on experience with Homer SIP capture or similar SIP monitoring tools.

 - Deep understanding of NAT traversal, STUN/TURN, WebRTC, and ICE frameworks.

 - Strong knowledge of load balancing, failover strategies, and traffic optimization.

 - Proficiency in Linux administration, networking, and troubleshooting.

 - Experience with database integration (Redis, PostgreSQL, or NoSQL solutions).

 - Familiarity with WebRTC, Asterisk, OpenSIPS, or RTP Proxy is a plus.

 - Ability to write Bash/Python (or Golang) scripts for automation and monitoring.

 - Strong problem-solving skills and ability to work in highly available and scalable environments.



Founded in Berlin in 2023 by serial entrepreneurs Albert Astabatsyan, Hakob Astabatsyan, and Sassun Mirzakhan-Saky, Synthflow AI democratizes access to advanced voice AI with a no-code platform that lets enterprises easily create, deploy and scale natural-sounding, cost-effective voice agents tailored to their business needs.

source_jobs.title: Marketing Intern, Channel Partnerships
source_jobs.description:
Synthflow AI is an enterprise AI agent platform that unifies customer operations across voice, chat, and messaging. Our agents handle routine interactions at scale so teams can focus on high-value work.

 - Over 20M hours of operations automated

 - 60% more calls answered vs. non-AI operators

 - 150M interactions handled, 99.99% uptime

Backed by Accel, Atlantic Labs, and Singular. Trusted by 1,000+ customers. Recognized as one of the most promising companies in Germany.




ABOUT THE ROLE

As a Marketing Intern for the Channel team, you will support outreach, content, research, and co-marketing initiatives aimed at helping Synthflow build and grow relationships with new and existing partners.

This is a hands-on role for someone who is excited about B2B marketing, partnerships, AI, and go-to-market execution. You will work closely with the Channel team to help identify partner prospects, run outreach campaigns, create partner-facing materials, and support ongoing partner communications.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Research potential partner companies in our target markets and build outreach lists

 - Support email and LinkedIn outreach campaigns to engage new partner prospects

 - Make sure partner leads and activities are correctly registered and updated in our CRM

 - Help create simple partner-facing materials such as one-pagers, case studies, and newsletter content

 - Support co-marketing activities and regular communications with existing partners

 - Help keep partner-related website content up to date




WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 - Currently studying or recently graduated in Marketing, Business, Communications, International Business, or a related field

 - Strong interest in B2B marketing, partnerships, SaaS, and AI

 - Excellent written communication skills in English, German is a plus.

 - Comfortable researching companies, markets, and target audiences

 - Organized, detail-oriented, and able to manage multiple tasks at once

 - Proactive, curious, and willing to learn quickly

 - Comfortable working with tools like LinkedIn, CRM systems, email platforms, Google Workspace, and basic content tools

 - Bonus: experience with outbound campaigns, partner marketing, newsletters, HubSpot, Salesforce, or similar tools

Founded in Berlin in 2023 by serial entrepreneurs Albert Astabatsyan, Hakob Astabatsyan, and Sassun Mirzakhan-Saky, Synthflow AI democratizes access to advanced voice AI with a no-code platform that lets enterprises easily create, deploy and scale natural-sounding, cost-effective voice agents tailored to their business needs.

source_jobs.title: Senior Python Software Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Synthflow AI is an enterprise AI agent platform that unifies customer operations across voice, chat, and messaging. Our agents handle routine interactions at scale so teams can focus on high-value work.

 - Over 20M hours of operations automated

 - 60% more calls answered vs. non-AI operators

 - 150M interactions handled, 99.99% uptime

Backed by Accel, Atlantic Labs, and Singular. Trusted by 1,000+ customers. Recognized as one of the most promising companies in Germany.



About the role:

We’re looking for a Senior Python Engineer to craft reliable, production-ready software and backend systems, with a strong emphasis on databases, scalable APIs, and engineering fundamentals.

Your responsibilities will include:

 - Develop and maintain our backend infrastructure, focusing on scalability, performance, and reliability.

 - Design and evolve data models and persistence layers with a strong focus on PostgreSQL and database best practices (schema design, migrations, query performance, indexing, transactions).

 - Build and maintain enterprise-grade APIs (e.g., FastAPI), including versioning, authentication/authorization, and observability.

 - Engage in pair programming to improve code quality and collaboration.

 - Manage deployments and environments using Kubernetes and GitOps practices (ArgoCD).

 - Conduct code reviews, providing constructive feedback and upholding best practices.

 - Contribute to product delivery end-to-end, including occasional work on front-end features when needed.


You have:

 - 5+ years of experience as a Python developer, shipping production systems.

 - Strong experience building scalable and extensible data infrastructure.

 - Deep familiarity with relational databases, especially PostgreSQL (performance tuning, migrations, transactions).

 - Experience building and maintaining enterprise-grade APIs with FastAPI.

 - Hands-on experience running production workloads on Kubernetes.

 - Experience with Argo CD (GitOps deployment workflows).

 - Experience with GitHub Actions.

 - Proficiency in cloud environments (preferably GCP or AWS).



Nice to have:

 - Ability to contribute to front-end work (not necessarily a front-end specialist), ideally with React/TypeScript.

 - Golang experience, with willingness to contribute to our orchestration stack, which is built in Go


What we offer:

 - Autonomy at speed: High-ownership roles in a fast-moving startup.

 - Engineering-first environment: Work on foundational systems that directly impact reliability and scale.

 - Career growth: Scale your impact as the company grows.

 - Rewarding package: Competitive pay, equity options, and comprehensive benefits that reflect your skills and experience.

Founded in Berlin in 2023 by serial entrepreneurs Albert Astabatsyan, Hakob Astabatsyan, and Sassun Mirzakhan-Saky, Synthflow AI democratizes access to advanced voice AI with a no-code platform that lets enterprises easily create, deploy and scale natural-sounding, cost-effective voice agents tailored to their business needs.
